intents.definition: A prospect is asking about products, services, capabilities, or commercial fit.
example_trigger_phrases: I would like to know more about your solution
Can you share more details about your services?

intents.definition: A prospect wants a live demo, walkthrough, or presentation.
example_trigger_phrases: I'd like to see the platform in action

intents.definition: A prospect or customer asks about pricing, plans, or costs.
example_trigger_phrases: What does the enterprise plan cost?

intents.definition: A sender requests a formal quotation for products or services.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you send a quotation for 100 licenses?

intents.definition: A company or individual proposes a strategic, reseller, referral, or integration partnership.
example_trigger_phrases: We would like to explore a partnership

intents.definition: A customer needs help using the product or resolving a non-technical issue.
example_trigger_phrases: I need help with my account
Can you assist with this issue?
I have a question about using the service

intents.definition: The sender reports a bug, outage, malfunction, or product behavior issue.
The sender cannot log in, access the account, reset credentials, or use authentication.
example_trigger_phrases: I lost access to my account

intents.definition: A customer disputes a charge, invoice, payment status, or billing configuration.
example_trigger_phrases: There is an issue with my invoice

intents.definition: A customer asks for a refund, reimbursement, or credit reversal.
A customer asks to cancel a service, subscription, or order.
example_trigger_phrases: I want to terminate the service

intents.definition: A sender expresses dissatisfaction with service, support, billing, or experience.
example_trigger_phrases: I am very unhappy with your service
I want to make a complaint

intents.definition: A sender explicitly escalates an unresolved issue or requests management attention.
example_trigger_phrases: I want to speak to a manager
This has not been resolved after multiple attempts

intents.definition: A customer or prospect requests a new feature, enhancement, or product capability.
example_trigger_phrases: It would be useful to have this function

intents.definition: A message seeks general information and does not fit a more specific operational category.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you clarify this for me?

intents.definition: A sender follows up on a prior unanswered or unresolved email.
example_trigger_phrases: Just following up on my previous email

intents.definition: A supplier or vendor sends an invoice requesting payment for delivered goods or services.
example_trigger_phrases: Attached is our invoice for March services
Kindly process the enclosed invoice for payment

intents.definition: A supplier asks about payment status, overdue payment, or expected payment date.
A vendor sends an account statement or reconciliation summary.
example_trigger_phrases: Please find attached our statement of account
Kindly review the outstanding balance summary

intents.definition: A vendor submits a credit note reducing or correcting a previously billed amount.
example_trigger_phrases: We issued a credit memo for the previous invoice

intents.definition: A vendor or internal user asks about PO issuance, status, mismatch, or details.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you share the PO number?
We have not received the purchase order
There is a mismatch between PO and invoice

intents.definition: A vendor confirms receipt or acceptance of a purchase order.
example_trigger_phrases: We confirm receipt of your PO

intents.definition: A new or existing supplier provides onboarding forms, tax docs, banking details, or registration data.
example_trigger_phrases: Please find our vendor onboarding documents
Attached are our tax and bank forms

intents.definition: A vendor requests a change to payment bank details or remittance instructions.
example_trigger_phrases: Please update our bank account details
Kindly use the new IBAN for future payments

intents.definition: A vendor or logistics provider gives a shipping, fulfillment, or delivery status update.
A supplier or carrier reports a delivery delay or fulfillment problem.
example_trigger_phrases: There is a logistics issue affecting delivery

intents.definition: A sender confirms receipt or execution of a payment.
A sender shares tax forms, VAT documents, withholding certificates, or similar compliance finance records.
example_trigger_phrases: Please find the tax form enclosed

intents.definition: A customer discusses renewing, renegotiating, or reviewing an expiring contract or subscription.
A customer wants to move to a higher plan, add capacity, or expand services.
example_trigger_phrases: We want to upgrade our plan
We need to move to enterprise

intents.definition: A customer wants to reduce service tier, seats, or commercial scope.
example_trigger_phrases: We want to downgrade our plan

intents.definition: A customer asks for onboarding, enablement, training, or education sessions.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you provide training for our team?

intents.definition: A sender issues a formal legal communication, claim, notice, or threat of action.
example_trigger_phrases: This is a formal legal notice
Our counsel has reviewed this matter
Please respond to this legal claim

intents.definition: A sender requests review, markup, or negotiation of contractual terms.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you confirm these contract terms?

intents.definition: A sender asks to execute or review a non-disclosure agreement.
example_trigger_phrases: Can we put an NDA in place?

intents.definition: A sender raises a privacy-related concern or request involving personal data handling.
example_trigger_phrases: How are you processing my personal data?
This relates to data protection rights

intents.definition: A person requests access to personal data held by the company.
example_trigger_phrases: Please provide a copy of my data
I am making a subject access request
What personal data do you hold about me?

intents.definition: A person requests deletion, erasure, or removal of personal data.
example_trigger_phrases: I want my account and data erased
Remove all information you hold about me

intents.definition: A sender reports unauthorized access, breach, compromise, or a suspected security event.
example_trigger_phrases: There may have been a data breach

intents.definition: A sender reports a scam, impersonation attempt, fake payment request, or phishing email.
example_trigger_phrases: We received a suspicious payment request

intents.definition: A candidate applies for a role and may attach a CV or resume.
example_trigger_phrases: I would like to apply for this role

intents.definition: A candidate follows up on an application, interview, or hiring process.
example_trigger_phrases: Any update on the interview process?
Checking the status of my candidacy

intents.definition: A recruiter or candidate coordinates interview timing or availability.
example_trigger_phrases: Here are my available time slots

intents.definition: An internal sender requests approval for spend, action, access, or workflow completion.
example_trigger_phrases: Can you sign off on this?

intents.definition: A sender requests a meeting, call, or calendar booking not primarily related to sales demo scheduling.
example_trigger_phrases: Can we set up a meeting?
Please book time to discuss this
Would you be available for a call?

intents.definition: A sender provides requested paperwork, forms, reports, or supporting documents.
example_trigger_phrases: Please find the completed form enclosed

intents.definition: An automatic system-generated response such as out-of-office or acknowledgment.
example_trigger_phrases: I am currently out of office
Thank you for your email, this inbox is unattended

intents.definition: A system message indicates that an email could not be delivered.
A mailing-list or subscription content message with no operational action needed.
example_trigger_phrases: View this email in your browser
You are receiving this newsletter because

intents.definition: An unsolicited promotional message, cold pitch, or generic sales outreach sent to the company inbox.
example_trigger_phrases: We can help you grow your business
I'd love 15 minutes of your time

intents.definition: A clearly irrelevant, suspicious, or non-business email with no legitimate action required.
A repeat of an already received message or submission with no new meaningful content.
example_trigger_phrases: Resending this in case you missed it
Please see my previous email below
